$schema-note: Suggested MCP servers for the CopilotKit A2UI hackathon starter. Hackers can opt-in by enabling these in their MCP-capable client (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, etc.). The CopilotKit docs server gives AI assistants live access to the canonical documentation so they don't hallucinate APIs or version-specific behavior. Pairs with the CopilotKit skill bundle — install via `npx skills add CopilotKit/CopilotKit` (see https://docs.copilotkit.ai/built-in-agent/build-with-agents).

copilotkit-docs.$comment: Canonical CopilotKit MCP server. Provides expert guidance and grounded code generation for CopilotKit + A2UI features. SSE endpoint; HTTP fallback at https://mcp.copilotkit.ai. See https://docs.copilotkit.ai/built-in-agent/build-with-agents for the companion skill bundle (copilotkit-setup et al).
copilotkit-docs.description: Live search + agent-development guidance over CopilotKit, AG-UI, and A2UI v0.9 documentation.

a2ui-spec.$comment: Optional: A2UI v0.9 specification reference. Useful when authoring custom catalogs or debugging envelope shape errors. If a canonical server doesn't exist, leave disabled and reference https://a2ui.org/specification/v0.9-a2ui/ manually.
